# Project Context (Frontend)

## Stack

- Angular application in `src/`
- Global styles in `src/styles.scss`
- Feature pages under `src/app/feature/`
- Shared code under `src/app/shared/`

## Conventions

- Keep features inside their feature folder.
- Reuse shared services, guards, interceptors, and models when possible.
- Keep UI and business logic separated.

## Current Main Areas

- Authentication: login/register
- Workflow management
- Dashboard, analytics, history, settings

## Notes

- Prefer minimal, focused changes.
- Avoid touching unrelated files.
